rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAGILAVY FAMILY TRUST ESTABLISHED JUNE 5, 1989 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanction
rulings.Rulings: The motion is granted, no opposition having been filed and no substantially compliant responses to the requests for admission having been served prior to the hearing date. The requests, to the extent they are within the scope of CCP section 2033.010, are deemed admitted, and Ms. Magilavy is ordered to pay Ms. Thomas sixty dollars as sanctions. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, August 6, 2019.
